assessment.approach: The challenge requires a two-step interaction: first, POST to /api/lattice/seed to obtain a runId and a capsule identifier. Second, PUT to /api/lattice/unseal using the runId in the body and the capsule identifier (base64url encoded) as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. The evidence confirms this workflow is consistent across multiple sessions.
evidenceUsed: The relation between response.body.json$.capsule and request.header$header.authorization
The relation between response.body.json$.runId and request.body.json$.runId
